content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "點牛肉麵",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要點什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào diǎn shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 dian3 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to order?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 주문하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要一份牛肉麵，不要辣。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yī fèn niúròu miàn, bù yào là.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 niu2 rou4 mian4, bu4 yao4 la4.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like one beef noodle soup, not spicy.",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수 한 그릇 주세요, 맵지 않게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，要不要加小菜？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, yào bù yào jiā xiǎocài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, yao4 bu4 yao4 jia1 xiao3 cai4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, would you like to add a side dish?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 곁들임 요리를 추가하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我要一份小菜。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yào yī fèn xiǎocài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 xiao3 cai4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I'd like one side dish.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 곁들임 요리 하나 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "請問要喝什麼飲料嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn yào hē shénme yǐnliào ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2 me yin3 liao4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Would you like a drink?",
          "translation_ko": "음료는 무엇으로 하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用了，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng le, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4 le, xie4 xie.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodle soup", "Chicken noodle soup", "Rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "닭고기 국수", "밥"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer. Order a bowl of beef noodle soup and a side dish. Say you don't want it spicy."
    },
    {
      "title": "點飲料",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要一杯珍珠奶茶，半糖，少冰。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yī bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, bàn táng, shǎo bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhen1 zhu1 nai3 cha2, ban4 tang2, shao3 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a bubble milk tea, half sugar, less ice.",
          "translation_ko": "버블 밀크티 한 잔 주세요, 당도는 반, 얼음은 적게."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，內用還是外帶？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, nèi yòng háishì wài dài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, nei4 yong4 hai2 shi4 wai4 dai4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, for here or to go?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 매장에서 드시나요, 포장하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "外帶，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Wài dài, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wai4 dai4, xie4 xie.",
          "translation_en": "To go, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "포장이요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "總共六十塊，請在這裡結帳。",
          "pinyin": "Zǒnggòng liùshí kuài, qǐng zài zhèlǐ jiézhàng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zong3 gong4 liu4 shi2 kuai4, qing3 zai4 zhe4 li3 jie2 zhang4.",
          "translation_en": "That's 60 dollars total. Please pay here.",
          "translation_ko": "총 60위안입니다. 여기서 계산해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我刷卡。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ shuākǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 shua1 ka3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll pay by card.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 카드로 계산할게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much sugar did the customer ask for?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 당도를 어떻게 요청했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Full sugar", "Half sugar", "No sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["보통 당도", "반 당도", "무가당"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the tones.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer. Order a bubble milk tea with half sugar and less ice, for takeaway."
    },
    {
      "title": "推薦滷肉飯",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我第一次來，請問有什麼推薦？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ dì yī cì lái, qǐng wèn yǒu shénme tuījiàn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 di4 yi1 ci4 lai2, qing3 wen4 you3 shen2 me tui1 jian4?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, this is my first time here. What do you recommend?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 처음 왔는데 추천해 주실 것이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "我們的招牌是滷肉飯，很好吃，很多人點。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen de zhāopái shì lǔròu fàn, hěn hǎochī, hěnduō rén diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 men de zhao1 pai2 shi4 lu3 rou4 fan4, hen3 hao3 chi1, hen3 duo1 ren2 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Our signature is braised pork rice. It's delicious and many people order it.",
          "translation_ko": "저희 대표 메뉴는 루로우판입니다. 맛있고 많은 분들이 주문하세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我要一份滷肉飯，還要一碗熱湯。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yào yī fèn lǔròu fàn, hái yào yī wǎn rè tāng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 lu3 rou4 fan4, hai2 yao4 yi1 wan3 re4 tang1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll have one braised pork rice and a bowl of hot soup.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 루로우판 하나랑 뜨거운 국 한 그릇 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "湯有兩種，一種是酸辣湯，一種是味噌湯，你要哪一種？",
          "pinyin": "Tāng yǒu liǎng zhǒng, yī zhǒng shì suān là tāng, yī zhǒng shì wèicēng tāng, nǐ yào nǎ yī zhǒng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tang1 you3 liang3 zhong3, yi1 zhong3 shi4 suan1 la4 tang1, yi1 zhong3 shi4 wei4 ceng1 tang1, ni3 yao4 na3 yi1 zhong3?",
          "translation_en": "There are two kinds of soup: hot and sour soup and miso soup. Which one would you like?",
          "translation_ko": "국은 두 종류가 있습니다. 하나는 사워 스프, 하나는 미소 스프입니다. 어떤 걸로 하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要酸辣湯，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào suān là tāng, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 suan1 la4 tang1, xie4 xie.",
          "translation_en": "I'll have the hot and sour soup, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "사워 스프로 할게요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 deng3 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the restaurant's signature dish?",
          "question_ko": "이 식당의 대표 메뉴는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodle soup", "Braised pork rice", "Fried rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "루로우판", "볶음밥"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and natural pauses.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer. Ask for a recommendation, then order the signature dish and a hot soup."
    }
  ]
}
